title: salix glandulosa
intro: Salix glandulosa, also known as glandular willow, is a species of willow tree native to China, characterized by its gray bark and lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix glandulosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Salix glandulosa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the latter being commonly used in herbal medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
